zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mobberly於大約1284年出生在英國爾莫波利時，他的父親William de Mobberley31歲，母親Mrs. William de Mobberley29歲。他和Maud Downes至少有2個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於大約1327年在英國爾盧德亞斯享年45歲，埋葬在英國爾莫波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mobberly于大约1284年出生在英国爾莫波利时，他的父亲William de Mobberley31岁，母亲Mrs. William de Mobberley29岁。他和Maud Downes至少有2个儿子和7个女儿。他去世于大约1327年在英国爾盧德亞斯享年45岁，埋葬在英国爾莫波利。

nameMeanings.name: Mobberly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mobberly was born about 1284, in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, his father, William de Mobberley, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. William de Mobberley, was 29. He had at least 2 sons and 7 daughters with Maud Downes. He died about 1327, in Rudheath, Cheshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Mobberley, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mobberly est né environ 1284, à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Mobberley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William de Mobberley, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles avec Maud Downes. Il est décédé environ 1327, à Rudheath, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mobberly um 1284 in Mobberley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Mobberley 31 und seine Mutter Mrs. William de Mobberley 29. Er hatte mit Maud Downes mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb um 1327 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Rudheath, Cheshire, England und wurde in Mobberley, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mobberly è nato il circa 1284 nel Mobberley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William de Mobberley, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William de Mobberley, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie con Maud Downes. Morì circa 1327, nel Rudheath, Cheshire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Mobberley, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mobberlyが約1284年にイギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーで生まれた時，父William de Mobberleyは31歳，母Mrs. William de Mobberleyは29歳であった。彼はMaud Downesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアルドヒースで45歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mobberly(이)가 대략 1284년 영국 체실르 모브벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mobberley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William de Mobberley(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Maud Downes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1327년 영국 체실르 루드히스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 모브벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mobberly nasceu aproximadamente 1284, em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Mobberley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William de Mobberley, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas com Maud Downes. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1327, em Rudheath, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mobberly родился около 1284 г. в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Mobberley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William de Mobberley, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей от Maud Downes. Он умер около 1327 г. в местности рудхит, чешир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mobberly nació aproximadamente 1284, en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Mobberley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. William de Mobberley, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas con Maud Downes. Murió aproximadamente 1327, en Rudheath, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
